raw:
{
  "verses": [
    {
      "n": 22,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Ko eſſi tu apfinehjis un
ſaimojis? un prett ko eſſi tu ta-
wu Baſſi pazeblis? un tawas
Azzis augſti uſzehlis? prett to
Swehtu eeſch Israëta.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 23,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Zaur taweein Wehſtne-
scheem eſſi tu to KUNgu apineh-
dijs/ un faſzijs: Eṣzaur manno
Ratto Bulku efmu ue to Kalnu
Augſtumeem kaḣpis/ us Liḣba-
nus Sahneem/ un es iſzirtifchu
winna angſtus Zeedra-Kohkus/
un iſlaſſitas Preedes/ un nah-
ſchn lihds tai Mahjas-Weetni /
tas paſchâ Gallâ irr winna Kar-
meta Mescha.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 24,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Es eſmu razzis un tweſchus
Uhdenis dſehris/un es ar fawahm
Pehdahm eſmu wiſfo ſtipro
Weetu lippes taufas padarrijs.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 25,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Ne eſſi tu dsirdejs/ ka es
to jaw fenn papreeſchu eſmu
darrijs/ jo wezḑs Laikds eſmu
es to taſfijs/ nu eſmu es to liẓ-
zis nahkt/ ka tew bij buht/ kam
bij ſtiprus Pilsfahtus iſpohſtiht/
un par pohſtahm Aknizu Koh-
pahm darriht.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 26,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Tapehz bija to Gedſthwo-
taju Rohkas nogurrufchas / un
tee tſtruhzinajahs/un tappe Kan-
na/ tee bija ka ta Tihruma Sah-
le/ un ka to Jumtu Seens/kas
fakalſt/ pirnis tas eenahkahs.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 27,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Bet es ſinnu tawu Dsih-
wokli/ un tawu Iſeechanu un ka tas KUNGS.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 28,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Tad tawas Trakkeſcha-
nas dehk prett mann/ un tawas
Wehlibas pehz / ka ta preeſch
mannahm Anzim nahkusi/ lik-
fchn es fawu Makschkert tawas
Nahfis / un Lauschhus tawâ
Muttê/ un likſchn tew atpakkat
greestees pa to Zelfu / pa kurre
tu eſſi nahzis.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 29,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Un ſchi buhſtew par twee-
Sihmi / ſchai Gaddâ ehD / E
kas ſainchts irr / un ohtrâ Gad-
dâ/ kas no ſew paſcha ang/ un
trefchâ Gaddâ fehjeet un ptanjeet/
un ſtahdajt Wihna-Dahrsus /
un ebdeet winnu Augſtus.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 30,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Jo tas Nams Juha/
kas tsglabbts un atlizzis irr/ ſak-
kinahs atkaat ſeimmjuhpp/ un neſ-
ſihs Angſus augſchop.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 31,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Jo no Jeruſalemes iſces
tee/ kas atlittſchi irr/ un tee at-
peſtiti no Zianas Kalna. To dar-
rihs ta karsta Duſinoſchana ta
KUNGA Zebâât.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 32,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Tapehz ta ſakka tas
KUNGS no ta Rehnina no Af-
ſirijas : Wiṅsch ſchaf Pilsfahta
ne nahks/ ir eeſch tahs ne weenu
Buſtu ſchaus / un ne kahdas
preeſchturranas Brukkas tue
preeſcha nahks / un ne kahdn
Walli prett to uſmettihs.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 33,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Pa to paſchu Zelfu/ kur
wiṅsch nahzis / buhs winnam
atpakkat greestees / bet ſchaf
Pilsfahta wiṅsch ne nahks/ ſak-
"
    }
  ],
  "confidence": "high",
  "notes": ""
}
